chapter_title.en: The Virtue of Mosques, Their Sanctity and the Reward for Those Who Pray in Them

text: 685 - وَ سُئِلَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: عَنْ قَبْرِ فَاطِمَةَ عَلَيْهَا اَلسَّلاَمُ فَقَالَ «دُفِنَتْ فِي بَيْتِهَا فَلَمَّا زَادَتْ بَنُو أُمَيَّةَ فِي اَلْمَسْجِدِ صَارَتْ فِي اَلْمَسْجِدِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.685 - Abu Al-Hasan, Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as) was asked about the grave of Sayyida Fatimah Al-Zahra {S.A}, and Imam (as) said:
"She was buried in her house, but when the Umayyads expanded the mosque, her grave became part of the mosque."
